narration.label: Intro
narration.text: Hi — this is a feature tour of LevelUp: the tools for points, prizes, ID cards, raffles, and more.

narration.label: Kiosk
narration.text: Kids sign in at the kiosk in seconds, usually with a quick scan.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: You can preview and print student ID cards right from the admin portal.

narration.label: Themes
narration.text: Design themes in minutes — describe the look, adjust colors, and preview it on student ID cards.

narration.label: Prizes
narration.text: They pick prizes they actually care about from the shop.

narration.label: Coupons
narration.text: Teachers print coupons when you want to reward on the spot.

narration.label: Raffle
narration.text: Raffles are a fun Friday ritual — tickets from points they already earned.

narration.label: Houses
narration.text: Houses help homerooms and teams cheer for each other.

narration.label: Hall of Fame
narration.text: Hall of Fame boards make shout-outs visible in the cafeteria or gym.

narration.label: Notifications
narration.text: Notifications mean fewer surprises about low stock or big milestones.

narration.label: Bulletin
narration.text: Bulletin boards keep families and students in the loop.

narration.label: Library
narration.text: Library tools track checkouts right beside rewards.

narration.label: Badges
narration.text: Badges and goals give quiet students a way to shine.

narration.label: Analytics
narration.text: Reports help you see who is engaging and where to help.

narration.label: Attendance
narration.text: Attendance options connect sign-in to how you already take roll.

narration.label: Outro
narration.text: That is LevelUp — kind to kids, clear for teachers, and calm for the front office. We would love to show your school.
